slides.title: The cheapest *anti-aging* habit is free at noon.
slides.sub: Daily sun exposure quietly ages your skin from the inside. A simple morning step may slow it.

slides.title: UVA goes deeper
slides.body: UVA rays pass through clouds and glass and reach the *deep layers* of your skin, where the structure that keeps it firm lives.

slides.title: It breaks down collagen
slides.body: That light switches on enzymes called matrix metalloproteinases, which *break down collagen and elastin*, the fibers that keep skin smooth and elastic.

slides.title: Most visible aging is sun
slides.body: Researchers estimate a large share of visible facial aging traces back to UV. Lines and laxity are *largely cumulative sun damage*.

slides.title: Broad-spectrum, every day
slides.body: Daily broad-spectrum SPF blocks both UVA and UVB. Used consistently, it *may slow photoaging* and is linked to lower skin-cancer risk.

slides.title: Tie it to a habit
slides.body: The hard part is consistency, not knowledge. Pairing sunscreen with brushing your teeth *makes it automatic* every morning.

slides.title: Small habits, *compounded for decades*.
slides.body: Vibe Health helps the daily habits stick by scoring your sleep, food, movement and steps in one simple Health Score you can build on.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
The best anti-aging move isn't a serum. It's the sunscreen you actually remember to use. ☀️🌿

UVA reaches deep and breaks down the collagen and elastin that keep skin firm, so daily broad-spectrum SPF may slow visible aging and is linked to lower skin-cancer risk. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns the habits that age you well into one daily score → link in bio.
youtube_title: Why Daily Sunscreen Is the Cheapest Anti-Aging Habit
